Subject: Free Web Seminar: Learn About the Benefits of Rules Technology
Message:
Hello!

You're invited to attend a free 60-minute web seminar on Wednesday, October 10th at 9:00 am PDT, 12:00 pm EDT.

Attend this seminar to learn how rules management technology can help you streamline business processes and significantly reduce operations costs.

To register for this seminar, click here: http://www.blazesoft.com/new_events/web_seminar/webinar1010hp.html

Blaze Advisor from HNC will be presenting  "Revolutionizing Application Development with Rules Management Technology."   This seminar will provide you with a business level overview of Blaze Advisor, the most advanced rules management software available, and will explain how you can significantly improve business processes and applications using rules management technology.

With Blaze Advisor you can,

*Automate high volume, complex processes and transactions
*Re-use business policies and enterprise data across all systems
*Update rules and data while in production with no down time
*Empower non-technical business managers by enabling them to control rule driven processes

James Taylor, Director of Product Marketing for Blaze Advisor, will be presenting
"Revolutionizing Application Development with Rules Management Technology ", and will explain how business rules work and how they can dramatically improve the way you design, develop, and maintain business applications.

To see a list of other upcoming Blaze Advisor web seminars click here:
http://www.blazesoft.com/new_events/upcoming_events.html
